title: Zhuangzi, Chapter 10: Rifling Trunks
description: Chapter 10 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.
introduction: Chapter 10 of the Zhuangzi — the Taoist masterpiece of paradox and parable.

translation.text: The world will not be at peace until all sages are dead. When all sages are dead, then the great robbers will arise, and the world will be in order. So long as the sages do not die, the great robbers will not stop appearing.
